  (n : ℕ) →
    (p : (f : P.X n ⟶ Q.X n) ×' (f' : P.X (n + 1) ⟶ Q.X (n + 1)) ×' f ≫ Q.d n (n + 1) = P.d n (n + 1) ≫ f') →

⊢ (P.mkHom Q zero one one_zero_comm succ).f 1 = one
